category_sources: Official SourceForge README describes it as a portable command-line ISP for NXP LPC and Analog Devices ADUC70xx.
source_facts.description: In-circuit programming (ISP) tool for several NXP microcontrollers.
display_name_sources: Official SourceForge project and code pages use lpc21isp.
docs_sources: Official SourceForge code browser includes the project README with build and usage notes.
source_facts.homepage is the official lpc21isp SourceForge website.
repo_sources: Official SourceForge lpc21isp Code page exposes SVN source control for the project.
tags_sources: Official README identifies command-line ISP support for NXP LPC and ADUC70xx devices.
source_facts.description identifies ISP programming for NXP microcontrollers.
